name: creativity-inc-overcoming-the-unseen-forces-that-stand-in-the-way-of-true-inspiration
description: Ed Catmull's inside story of Pixar's creative culture — the Braintrust, candor, protecting the creative process, and embracing failure as essential to innovation.
useCase: Learn how Pixar built and sustained a creative culture — the Braintrust, candor, protecting the process, and embracing failure.
knownRisks: Pixar-specific examples may not apply to all organizations
Some may find the culture difficult to replicate
